title: Update battle creation with stages
description:
Update createBattle to accept stages/timezone, validate deadlines, and schedule QStash jobs. Includes:
- Accept authoritativeTimezone (IANA), stages array with stageNumber/title/submissionDeadline/votingDeadline
- Set battle status to 'draft' or 'active' based on start time
- Validation: unique stage numbers, monotonic deadlines, non-overlapping windows
- Minimum duration: 5 min between submissionDeadline and votingDeadline
- Zero-gap allowed between votingDeadline(n) and submissionDeadline(n+1)
- Convert creator TZ inputs to UTC before storage
- Schedule QStash jobs for each transition, store messageIds in qstashJobIds
close_reason: Battle creation with stages, QStash scheduling, stage transition worker, and submission/vote gating all implemented.

title: Implement battle remote functions
description: Implement getBattles, getBattle, createBattle, updateBattle, deleteBattle in battle.remote.ts with proper auth checks and 8-char nanoid

title: Update battle create form for stages
description:
Add timezone selector and stage deadline inputs to /b/new. Includes:
- Timezone selector (IANA timezone picker)
- Dynamic stage form: add/remove stages
- Per-stage fields: title, submissionDeadline (datetime-local), votingDeadline (datetime-local)
- Client-side validation: deadlines in order, minimum 5 min gaps
- Display times in selected timezone, submit as UTC
close_reason: Form updated with timezone selector and dynamic stages. Cancellation now cleans up QStash jobs.

title: Update battle schema with new status enum and defaults
description: Add draft/cancelled to status enum, add notNull to name, add defaults for status/visibility/maxPlayers, add validation refinements via drizzle-valibot

title: Add stage schema and battle status enum
description:
Schema changes for stages feature:
- battle: add 'status' enum (draft/active/completed/cancelled), authoritativeTimezone (text), currentStageId (FK)
- stage: new table with battleId, stageNumber, title, submissionDeadline, votingDeadline, phase enum (upcoming/submission/voting/closed), qstashJobIds (jsonb)
- Unique constraint on (battleId, stageNumber)
- Phase and currentStageId are worker-owned
close_reason: Schema aligned with design (vibe→title, phase enum updated, QStashJobRef typed). QStash client and webhook endpoint created with signature verification.

title: Setup QStash for stage transitions
description:
Configure QStash client and create webhook endpoint for stage transitions. Includes:
- QStash client setup with signature verification
- Webhook endpoint at /api/qstash/stage-transition
- Payload schema: { battleId, stageId, stageNumber, action, expectedDeadline, authoritativeTimezone, idempotencyHash }
- Actions: submission_open, voting_open, stage_closed, battle_completed
- Idempotent handlers (return 2xx on duplicate/stale delivery)
- Exponential backoff and DLQ configuration
close_reason: Schema aligned with design (vibe→title, phase enum updated, QStashJobRef typed). QStash client and webhook endpoint created with signature verification.

title: Build battle edit form and page
description: Implement /b/[id]/edit with form using Field components, updateBattle and deleteBattle remote functions. Wrap query in <svelte:boundary> with pending/failed snippets.

title: Phase 1: Battle CRUD
description: Implement core CRUD operations for battles. Users can create, view, edit, and cancel battles. See docs/plans/2025-12-28-battle-crud-design.md for full design.
close_reason: All subtasks completed: create form, detail page, edit page, home page

title: Add submission/vote gating by stage phase
description:
Gate submissions and votes by active stage and time windows:
- Submission allowed: stage is active AND now < submissionDeadline (exclusive end)
- Voting allowed: stage is active AND submissionDeadline <= now < votingDeadline (exclusive end)
- Reject actions at exact deadline (boundary condition)
- Enforce doubleSubmissions limit per stage
- Use stored currentStageId and server time, never client time
close_reason: Battle creation with stages, QStash scheduling, stage transition worker, and submission/vote gating all implemented.

title: Update schema for stages
description: Add authoritativeTimezone to battle; change stage deadlines to timestamp; add unique constraint (battleId, stageNumber)

title: Implement stage transition worker
description:
Implement handlers to update phase/currentStageId and trigger results generation. Includes:
- Guard checks: verify now >= expectedDeadline, prior stages closed
- Phase transitions: upcoming → submission → voting → closed
- Update currentStageId when advancing to next stage
- Set battle status to 'completed' when last stage closes
- Results generation trigger at voting close
- All updates must be idempotent across retries
close_reason: Battle creation with stages, QStash scheduling, stage transition worker, and submission/vote gating all implemented.

title: Build battle create form and page
description: Implement /b/new with form using Field components, createBattle remote function

title: Stages design doc updates
description: Capture decisions: store phase/currentStageId with cron updates, zero-gap allowed, time-only progression with auto results, QStash scheduling.

title: Build home page with battles list
description: Implement /home with getBattles, Empty state, battle cards linking to detail pages. Wrap query in <svelte:boundary> with pending/failed snippets.

title: Build battle detail page
description: Implement /b/[id] with Card info display, edit button for owner. Wrap query in <svelte:boundary> with pending/failed snippets.

title: Implement battle cancellation and deletion
description:
Handle battle lifecycle termination:
- Cancellation: cancel all pending QStash jobs, set all phases to closed, set battle status to cancelled, preserve submissions/votes
- Deletion: cancel QStash jobs first, cascade delete stages/submissions/votes
- Stage modification rules: full CRUD in draft, only extend future deadlines when active, no edits when completed/cancelled
- On deadline change: revalidate sequence, cancel/reschedule affected QStash jobs
close_reason: Form updated with timezone selector and dynamic stages. Cancellation now cleans up QStash jobs.
